blog.title: CookMate Blog
blog.subtitle: Meal planning tips, AI cooking guides, and more
blog.post1Title: The Complete Guide to Weekly Meal Prep
blog.post1Excerpt: Master weekly meal prep and never worry about weeknight dinners again. From ingredient selection to storage, we've got you covered.
blog.post2Excerpt: How to get the best results from AI recipe generation. 5 practical tips to make CookMate work for your taste.
blog.post3Excerpt: Never done meal prep before? Start here. A simple three-step process to get your weekly meals sorted.
blog.post4Title: Save Money on Groceries with Smart Lists
blog.post4Excerpt: Use the grocery list feature to cut impulse buying and save up to 30% on your weekly food bill.
blog.post5Title: What is CookMate? A Complete Overview
blog.post5Excerpt: AI-powered meal planning platform. Enter ingredients, get recipes in seconds. Generate weekly plans with one click.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.infoCollectDesc: To provide our services, we may collect the following information:
privacy.infoCollect1: Account information: email address, phone number, username
privacy.infoCollect2: Usage data: dietary preferences, cuisine preferences, cooking history
privacy.infoCollect3: Device information: browser type, operating system, IP address
privacy.infoCollect4: Payment records (actual payment processed by Stripe/Alipay — we do not store card numbers)
privacy.usageDesc: We use the collected information to:
privacy.usage1: Provide and improve AI recipe recommendations
privacy.usage2: Generate weekly meal plans and shopping lists
privacy.usage3: Improve user experience and product features
privacy.dataShareDesc: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data only with your explicit consent, as required by law, or to provide the service (e.g., AI API calls).
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use essential cookies to operate the website. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.rights1: Access and view your personal information
privacy.rights3: Delete your account and related data

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptDesc: By using CookMate, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining your account security and for all activities under your account. Do not share your credentials.
terms.subscriptionDesc: Paid subscriptions auto-renew according to your selected plan. You can manage your subscription in the billing page. Upon cancellation, Pro features remain available until the end of the current billing period.
terms.aiDesc: AI-generated recipes are for reference only, including nutritional information and calorie estimates. Users should verify independently before use.
terms.disclaimerDesc: CookMate's dietary suggestions and nutritional information are for reference only and do not constitute medical advice. Consult a professional for specific dietary needs or health concerns.
terms.liabilityDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CookMate shall not be liable for indirect damages arising from the use of this service.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions about CookMate
faq.a1: Yes, CookMate offers a free plan with 1 AI recipe recommendation per day. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
faq.q2: How do I upgrade to Pro?
faq.a2: Go to the billing page and select the Pro plan. We accept Alipay and credit card payments. The yearly plan offers better value.
faq.a3: AI recipes are trained on extensive recipe data. Nutritional information is estimated and for reference only. Please verify independently for special dietary needs.
faq.a4: We use encrypted storage and do not sell your personal information. See our Privacy Policy for details.
faq.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a5: Manage your subscription on the billing page. Pro features remain active until the end of the current billing period, then downgrade to Free.
faq.a6: Chinese users can pay with Alipay. International users can use Stripe (credit card) and Creem.
faq.q7: Can I bind my phone number?
faq.a7: Yes, you can bind your phone number in Settings. It can be used for login and password recovery.
faq.q8: How do I delete my account?
faq.a8: Online account deletion is not yet available. Please email CookMate@aaigc.online to request deletion.

about.title: About CookMate
about.subtitle: Let AI solve your daily 'what to eat' dilemma
about.storyP1: CookMate was born from the simplest yet most annoying problem — having to think about 'what to eat' every single day. Whether it's a busy workday or a relaxing weekend, this seemingly simple question always drains our energy.
about.storyP2: We thought: why not let AI make this decision for you? Tell CookMate what ingredients you have in your fridge or what flavors you crave, and get a customized recipe in 3 seconds. From weekly plans to shopping lists, it's a one-stop solution for the complete cycle of 'what to eat → what to buy → how to cook'.
about.missionDesc: Making every meal easy for everyone. No culinary skills required, no complex planning needed — just open CookMate and get it done in 3 seconds.
about.featureAiDesc: Advanced AI recommends the best recipes based on your ingredients and taste preferences
about.featureSpeedDesc: Enter ingredients and see what you can cook in the blink of an eye, with detailed steps and cooking times
about.featureFullDesc: From weekly planning to shopping lists — one-stop management so you never miss an ingredient
about.ctaDesc: Sign up for free and experience AI-powered smart recipe recommendations

testimonials.title: What Users Say
testimonials.item1Content: After work, the last thing I want is to figure out dinner. Now I open CookMate, type in what's in my fridge, and get an answer in 3 seconds. So convenient!
testimonials.item2Content: Tracking calories during my cutting phase used to be a pain. CookMate's AI recommendations handle the nutrition breakdown for me — one click and my weekly plan is ready.
testimonials.item3Content: With a big family and different tastes, CookMate's meal plan saved us from dinner arguments. The shopping list is a lifesaver too.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to stop wondering what to cook?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Sign up free and start smart meal planning in 3 seconds 👇
